zh.lifeSummary: Steven de Merton是Ranulphus de Merton, Alias de Sutton和Mrs. Ranulphus de Merton的兒子，於1276年出生在英國英格蘭。他和Mrs Steven Merton至少有1個女兒。他去世於從1352年1月25日到1353年1月24日在英國爾貝比頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Steven de Merton是Ranulphus de Merton, Alias de Sutton和Mrs. Ranulphus de Merton的儿子，于1276年出生在英国英格兰。他和Mrs Steven Merton至少有1个女儿。他去世于从1352年1月25日到1353年1月24日在英国爾貝比頓。

nameMeanings.name: Merton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the many places called Merton, such as found in Surrey, Kent, Devon, Oxfordshire, and Norfolk. The placename derives from Old English mere ‘pool’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. There has probably been some confusion with both Marton and Murton .

variants.name: Marton
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Laszlo, Antal, Arpad, Geza, Andras, Bela, Denes, Endre, Gaza, Imre, Istvan, Janos.

English: habitational name from any of several places so called, principally in Lincolnshire, Warwickshire, and North Yorkshire, named in Old English as ‘settlement by a lake’ (from mere or mær ‘pool, lake’ + tūn ‘settlement’) or as ‘settlement by a boundary’ (from (ge)mære ‘boundary’ + tūn ‘settlement’). Compare Martin 2.
Hungarian (Márton): from the personal name Márton (see Martin 1). This surname is also found in Romania; see also 3 below.

nameMeanings.name: Steven
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , reflecting the normal pronunciation of the name in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Stephen
meanings: Usual English spelling of the name of the first Christian martyr (Acts 6–7), whose feast is accordingly celebrated next after Christ's own ( 26 December ). His name is derived from the Greek word stephanos ‘garland, crown’.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: Steven de Merton was born in 1276, in England, United Kingdom as the son of Ranulphus de Merton, Alias de Sutton and Mrs. Ranulphus de Merton. He had at least 1 daughter with Mrs Steven Merton. He died from 25 January 1352 to 24 January 1353, in Bebington, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Steven de Merton est né en 1276, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Ranulphus de Merton, Alias de Sutton et Mrs. Ranulphus de Merton. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Mrs Steven Merton. Il est décédé du 25 janvier 1352 au 24 janvier 1353, à Bebington, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Steven de Merton wurde 1276 in England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Ranulphus de Merton, Alias de Sutton und Mrs. Ranulphus de Merton geboren. Er hatte mit Mrs Steven Merton mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb von 25. Januar 1352 bis 24. Januar 1353 in Bebington, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Steven de Merton è nato il nel 1276 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Ranulphus de Merton, Alias de Sutton e Mrs. Ranulphus de Merton. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Mrs Steven Merton. Morì da 25 gennaio 1352 a 24 gennaio 1353, nel Bebington, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Steven de Mertonは1276年にイギリスイギリスでRanulphus de Merton, Alias de SuttonとMrs. Ranulphus de Mertonの息子として生まれた。彼はMrs Steven Mertonとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼はから1352年1月25日まで1353年1月24日にイギリスチェシュアイアベビントンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Steven de Merton(은)는 1276년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Ranulphus de Merton, Alias de Sutton(와)과 Mrs. Ranulphus de Merton의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Mrs Steven Merton(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1352년 1월 25일부터 1353년 1월 24일까지 영국 체실르 베빙턴에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Steven de Merton nasceu em 1276, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Ranulphus de Merton, Alias de Sutton e Mrs. Ranulphus de Merton. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Mrs Steven Merton. Ele faleceu de 25 de janeiro de 1352 a 24 de janeiro de 1353, em Bebington, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Steven de Merton родился в 1276 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Ranulphus de Merton, Alias de Sutton и Mrs. Ranulphus de Merton. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Mrs Steven Merton. Он умер с 25 января 1352 по 24 января 1353 в местности бебингтон, чешир, Англия.
